examples: Objective To study whether mercaptoethanol or vitamin C could block the inhibition of erythrocyte SOD by cadmium.

When the proteins of pollens were treated with ultrapure water and mercaptoethanol, no specific band was observed among the self-incompatible lines and the compatible lines.
What Dr Zussman and his colleagues have managed to do is break the internal bonds in the protein molecules by mixing them with a chemical called beta-mercaptoethanol.
